title: The Lucent Maze
subtitle: An engaging and futuristic event that combined fun with innovation, The Lucent Maze offered participants a unique experience of agility and creativity. From navigating laser beams to capturing striking visuals, the event blended science and entertainment seamlessly.
description: The Lucent Maze was held on 25th August 2025 from 1:00 PM to 4:00 PM in the Sports Room, organized by BVP Optica (OSA Student Chapter). The event featured two segments—Laser Maze and Laser Photography. Participants tested their agility and focus by navigating through laser beams, while the photography session allowed them to capture creative, futuristic moments. The event ensured an exciting mix of learning and fun for everyone.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
